posts.author: MichaelPr (Michael Pronk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

We have a challenge that we cannot use mirror boards in automated gmail emails to contacts. I have tried setting up General Caster as a solution, but every time my contact changes, the email is not created in the dedicated email column. I am looking for support on how to solve it.

posts.author: MichaelPr (Michael Pronk)
